bands.label: low
bands.text:
The ease, spontaneity, and social energy characteristic of the sanguine temperament aren't your dominant traits.

You likely express other temperament traits more strongly.

bands.label: average
bands.text:
You have a moderate share of sanguine ease and sociability, combined with other temperament traits.

This gives you a balanced level of energy in social situations.

bands.label: high
bands.text:
You're naturally cheerful, sociable, and quick to adapt to new people and situations. Enthusiasm and optimism are your defining traits.

This is a valuable trait for roles that call for energetic communication, with room to benefit from building more consistency in following through on long-term tasks.

questions.text: I'm sociable and cheerful by nature.
New situations excite me more than they scare me.
I adapt easily to new people and circumstances.

bands.label: low
bands.text:
The intense drive and assertive energy of the choleric temperament aren't your dominant traits.

You likely approach goals at a calmer, more gradual pace.

bands.label: average
bands.text:
You have a moderate share of drive and decisiveness, combined with other temperament traits.

This gives you a balanced level of assertiveness in pursuing goals.

bands.label: high
bands.text:
You're energetic, goal-driven, and decisive, with a natural inclination to lead and achieve results quickly.

This is a valuable trait for roles that require initiative and assertiveness, with room to benefit from building more patience in situations that call for a slower pace.

questions.text: I move energetically toward the goals I set.
I enjoy taking on a leadership role.
I make decisions and act quickly.
I persistently pursue the results I want.

bands.label: low
bands.text:
The deep reflection and inclination toward detailed analysis characteristic of the melancholic temperament aren't your dominant traits.

You likely approach decisions faster and with less attention to detail.

bands.label: average
bands.text:
You have a moderate inclination toward reflection and attention to detail, combined with other temperament traits.

This gives you a balanced approach between depth of analysis and speed of action.

bands.label: high
bands.text:
You tend toward deep reflection, are attentive to detail, and strive to understand things deeply rather than superficially.

This is a valuable trait for analytical and creative work, with the benefit of watching that over-analysis doesn't turn into persistent doubt.

questions.text: I tend to analyze situations deeply.
I notice details that others might miss.
Understanding the deeper essence of things matters to me.
I tend to reflect on my own actions.

bands.label: low
bands.text:
The calm even-temperedness and slow, steady pace characteristic of the phlegmatic temperament aren't your dominant traits.

You likely react to situations with more energy and speed.

bands.label: average
bands.text:
You have a moderate share of calm and even-temperedness, combined with other temperament traits.

This gives you a balanced level of stability in how you react to events.

bands.label: high
bands.text:
You're naturally calm, even-tempered, and rarely swayed by emotional impulses. Stability and patience are your defining traits.

This is a valuable trait for roles that require composure and consistency, with the benefit of consciously stepping up initiative where a situation calls for quick action.

questions.text: I stay calm even in tense situations.
I'm comfortable with a stable, predictable pace.
I'm rarely swept up by emotional impulses.
Patience is one of my strong traits.

portraits.title: The Dynamic Leader
portraits.text: Sociability pairs, in you, with goal-driven assertiveness. You naturally inspire people while decisively driving toward results — a powerful combination for leadership roles.

portraits.title: The Thoughtful Stabilizer
portraits.text: Deep reflection pairs, in you, with calm even-temperedness. You make decisions thoughtfully and stay stable even in difficult circumstances — this makes you a reliable anchor for those around you.
